mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.item_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.is_read, c.create_time, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM biz_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.item_id = #{itemId} AND c.deleted = 0 AND (c.parent_id IS NULL OR c.parent_id = 0) ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.item_id, c.user_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.is_read, c.create_time, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM biz_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.item_id = #{itemId} AND c.deleted = 0 AND c.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND c.parent_id != 0 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
